safest_plan.entry_basis: moneytaur — monthly green demand band ~€1,200 (chart + text 'next is the monthly green ~€1,200'). This is the next zone BELOW the current price; the source's stated buy zones at ~€1,900 (3D clean reversal) and ~€1,500 (3D partial) are both already broken by the live price of ~€1,461.

targets.basis: moneytaur — reclaim of the red supply band ~€2,800
moneytaur — 'D partial' demand/supply zone ~€3,250 on the chart

safest_plan.stop_basis: below the monthly green demand band ~€1,200 (estimated ~€1,150); below that the source names no further support

stance_by_source.summary: Plan to slowly buy Ethereum at lower prices — stacked buy zones near €1,900 then €1,500 — aiming for a recovery back to €2,800 and €3,250.

conflicts: The plan said to buy the €1,500 zone, but the live price (~€1,461) has already dropped below it, so that buy level has failed — the only support the source names below here is the monthly zone around €1,200.

The chart shows an extra buy zone labelled '7D and lower' around €2,350–€2,450 that the extracted text omits, but it sits above the current price and has already been broken, so it offers no support right now.
This is a single source from 2026-06-05; price has fallen sharply since, so the read is contested by current price action rather than by a second opinion.
plain_english: One trader laid out a plan to gradually buy Ethereum at lower prices, with buy zones near €1,900 and €1,500 and a hope of recovering toward €2,800 and €3,250. Since then the price has fallen to about €1,461, which is already below the deepest buy zone he named, so that plan has effectively broken down. The only support level he points to below here is around €1,200. Wait — don't buy into this falling price; let it either reach the ~€1,200 zone or climb back above €1,500 and steady before considering anything.
